title: Ethiopian-Style Turkey Stew
description: A flavorful and comforting stew made with tender turkey and spices from Ethiopia. This dish is perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: Heat buttery in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add turkey neck and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add stew and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until turkey is tender, about 1 1/2 hours.
Season with Ethiopian spices and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
